creator: dfilter@FreeBSD.ORG
text:
Author: wg
Date: Thu Aug  1 22:20:24 2013
New Revision: 324135
URL: http://svnweb.freebsd.org/changeset/ports/324135

Log:
  ports-mgmt/portsreinstall: update to 3.0.3
  
  - Update to 3.0.3
  
  Changes:
   - BUG FIX: Cleaning of distfiles before retrial of failed fetch was forgotten
  
  PR:		ports/180989
  Submitted by:	Mamoru Sakaue <sakaue.mamoru samurai.mwghennn.net> (maintainer)

Modified:
  head/ports-mgmt/portsreinstall/Makefile
  head/ports-mgmt/portsreinstall/distinfo

Modified: head/ports-mgmt/portsreinstall/Makefile
==============================================================================
--- head/ports-mgmt/portsreinstall/Makefile	Thu Aug  1 22:04:01 2013	(r324134)
+++ head/ports-mgmt/portsreinstall/Makefile	Thu Aug  1 22:20:24 2013	(r324135)
@@ -2,9 +2,9 @@
 # $FreeBSD$
 
 PORTNAME=	portsreinstall
-PORTVERSION=	3.0.2
+PORTVERSION=	3.0.3
 CATEGORIES=	ports-mgmt
-MASTER_SITES=	SFJP/${PORTNAME}/59115/ \
+MASTER_SITES=	SFJP/${PORTNAME}/59240/ \
 		http://www.mwghennndo.com/software/${PORTNAME}/
 
 MAINTAINER=	sakaue.mamoru@samurai.mwghennn.net
@@ -12,7 +12,7 @@ COMMENT=	Ports upgrading utility for mas
 
 LICENSE=	BSD
 
-MAN8=	${PORTNAME}.8
+MAN8=		${PORTNAME}.8
 MANCOMPRESSED=	yes
 
 post-install:

Modified: head/ports-mgmt/portsreinstall/distinfo
==============================================================================
--- head/ports-mgmt/portsreinstall/distinfo	Thu Aug  1 22:04:01 2013	(r324134)
